Advice to the Thrifty


Is Get a Homestead

pages.raw_text:
Unless you have position pay
ing you a substantial salary, UNI
less you are especially skilled In
your profession or craft. you, Mr..
Thrifty Young Man, should either
get a piece of homestead land or
a homestead REIMBURSEMENT. There
are some yet to be had In Adams
and Stevens counties. Splendid
wheat land. right In the great
northwestern wheat belt Miles
am miles Of smiling fields teem-
Ing with ears of golden grain. are
In the neighborhood. They will
bring affluence to the producer, as
wheat Ia fuel for the body and must
be bought. as life itself depends
ON 1t. We may dispense with other
things, but we must have bread.
Produce wheat, and be q success
full bread winner.


Perhaps more people are CRATE
full because they own good home
and an. honest competency today.
ana perhaps no man has inspired
more confidence In such people
than has Mr.. William Evans.

tleman, always glad TO meet the
man with the hoe, who has the
Drawn and strength to 20 into an
